ddls:
CREATE TABLE "super_bowl_events" (
  "super_bowl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Super Bowl event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the Super Bowl was held */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the Super Bowl was held */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the Super Bowl event */,
  "game_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "game_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winning team */,
  "loser" TEXT /* Losing team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "mvp" TEXT /* Most Valuable Player (MVP) of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("super_bowl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "broadcast_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., TV, streaming) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "super_bowl_broadcasts" (
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each broadcast */,
  "super_bowl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Super Bowl event */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast network */,
  "avg_us_viewers" REAL /* Average U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "total_us_viewers" REAL /* Total U.S. viewers in millions */,
  "rating_household" REAL /* Household rating */,
  "share_household" INTEGER /* Household share */,
  "rating_18_49" REAL /* 18-49 demographic rating */,
  "share_18_49" INTEGER /* 18-49 demographic share */,
  "ad_cost" REAL /* Cost of a 30-second advertisement in dollars */,
  "broadcast_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the broadcast */,
  "broadcast_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the broadcast */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the broadcast */,
  "ad_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by advertisements during the broadcast */,
  "production_cost" REAL /* Production cost of the broadcast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_super_bowl_broadcasts_super_bowl_id FOREIGN KEY ("super_bowl_id") REFERENCES super_bowl_events ("super_bowl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_super_bowl_broadcasts_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES broadcast_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewer_demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic segment */,
  "demographic_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic segment */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Start of the age range for the demographic segment */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* End of the age range for the demographic segment */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic segment */,
  "demographic_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the demographic segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewer_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each viewer rating */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic segment */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating for the demographic segment */,
  "share" INTEGER /* Share for the demographic segment */,
  "demographic_rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., household, demographic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_ratings_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES super_bowl_broadcasts ("broadcast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewer_ratings_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES viewer_demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisers" (
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertiser */,
  "advertiser_name" TEXT /* Name of the advertiser */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the advertiser */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the advertiser's company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters of the advertiser */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the advertiser */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number for the advertiser */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the advertiser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advertiser_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertisements" (
  "ad_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertisement */,
  "broadcast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broadcast */,
  "advertiser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the advertiser */,
  "ad_title" TEXT /* Title of the advertisement */,
  "ad_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the advertisement in seconds */,
  "ad_cost" REAL /* Cost of the advertisement in dollars */,
  "ad_type" TEXT /* Type of advertisement (e.g., video, image, audio) */,
  "ad_category" TEXT /* Category of the advertisement (e.g., automotive, food, sports) */,
  "ad_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the advertisement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ad_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_advertiser_id FOREIGN KEY ("advertiser_id") REFERENCES advertisers ("advertiser_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertisements_broadcast_id FOREIGN KEY ("broadcast_id") REFERENCES super_bowl_broadcasts ("broadcast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the feature was accessed */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the feature */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
